title: Smallhold comparison audit
description: Audit Broadside against bug patterns found in smallhold code reviews and run the same conformance test suites. Source: last 20 commits in ../smallhold.
close_reason: All 18 children complete. 3 bugs fixed (WebFinger 404, style injection, streaming body limits). 9 audited clean. 2 closed N/A (no Mastodon API). 1 robustness test added (25 vectors). 3 conformance suites run via ngrok (36/38 pass, 2 minor findings: empty resource handling, missing CORS).
